dialogueChunks.intro: The situation has gotten worse, {player_name}. Another ally was found dead near {location_hint}. The killer was one of our own: still doesn't believe what they did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I found tracks leading toward {location_hint} that suggest the {enemy_type} are deliberately provoking these attacks. The {quest_focus} seems to be the key: whoever controls it can turn anyone against their allies. {target_npc} might know more about how to counter it.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need {quest_item} to break this cycle. Without it, every patrol we send out is a gamble on whether they'll come back as themselves.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the guards are refusing to patrol. After what happened, I can't blame them. Nobody wants to be the next one to harm a friend.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} spreading faster than we expected. {quest_ally} confirmed that the {enemy_type} have been planting {quest_item} along our routes: it's what triggers the confusion. {target_npc} thinks there's a way to neutralize the effect, but it requires materials from deep in hostile territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement is paralyzed. If we can't trust our own eyes, we can't defend ourselves. Get to {target_npc} and find out what they need.

dialogueChunks.intro: The guilt is eating this place alive. People sit by the graves of the ones they harmed and won't speak.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered that the {quest_threat} originates from {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} have been using the {quest_focus} to turn our people into weapons against each other. It's deliberate and methodical. {quest_ally} is willing to guide you, but even they aren't sure they can trust their own senses anymore.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have to strike at the source and destroy the {quest_focus} before there's no one left who trusts anyone.
